phrases.intent_en: Ask where the public weighing scales are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as balanças públicas do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH buh-LAHNNG-suhsh POOB-lee-kuhsh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Public scales are standard in Portuguese markets for verifying stall weights.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, pergunte no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, ask at the information desk.

responses.english: Good morning, ask at the information desk.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Bom dia, pergunte no balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find Queijo de Évora
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro o Queijo de Évora DOP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo AW KAY-zhoo DIH EH-voo-ruh DAWP?
phrases.cultural_note: Queijo de Évora DOP is a protected local cheese often sold at dedicated counters.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao vendedor na secção de queijos.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR NUH SEH-sown DIH KAY-zhoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the vendor in the cheese section.

responses.english: Ask the vendor in the cheese section.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR NUH SEH-sown DIH KAY-zhoosh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao vendedor na secção de queijos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the public weighing scales are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as balanças de pesagem pública?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH buh-LAHNNG-suhsh DIH peh-ZAH-zhayng POOB-lee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Scales are placed near entrances to ensure transparency in market purchases.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a área das balanças de pesagem pública.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH AH-reeuh DUHSH buh-LAHNNG-suhsh DIH peh-ZAH-zhayng POOB-lee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the public weighing scales area.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the public weighing scales area.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH AH-reeuh DUHSH buh-LAHNNG-suhsh DIH peh-ZAH-zhayng POOB-lee-kuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a área das balanças de pesagem pública.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Alentejo sausage
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar chouriço alentejano autêntico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR shoow-REE-soo uh-layng-tih-ZHAHN-noo ow-TAYNG-tee-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Chouriço alentejano is a traditional cured sausage, best bought from specialist vendors.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um vendedor na secção de enchidos.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR NUH SEH-sown DIH ayng-SHEE-doosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a vendor in the sausage section.

responses.english: Ask a vendor in the sausage section.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR NUH SEH-sown DIH ayng-SHEE-doosh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um vendedor na secção de enchidos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the interior chapel is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a capela interior do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh een-tih-REEOHR DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: The interior chapel is a unique historical feature within the market structure.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao balcão de informações central.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the central information desk.

responses.english: Ask at the central information desk.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH sayngt-RAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte ao balcão de informações central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find fresh fish section
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a secção de peixe fresco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Fresh fish is delivered daily and displayed in the refrigerated rear section.
